name: FT5X06 Touch Screen Controller
description: The `ft5x06` touchscreen platform allows using the touch screen controllers based on the ft5x06 chip with ESPHome. The [I²C](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) is required to be set up in your configuration for this touchscreen to work.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The touchscreen polling interval - used only if an interrupt pin is not in use. Defaults to `50ms`.

config_entries.label: Interrupt Pin
config_entries.description: The GPIO pin to use as the interrupt pin. This pin is used to detect when the touchscreen has new data available. If not set, the touchscreen will be polled instead of using interrupts.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually set the ID of this touchscreen.

config_entries.label: Calibration
config_entries.description: Some touchscreens require calibration on a per-device basis.

config_entries.label: X Max
config_entries.description: The raw value corresponding to the right

config_entries.label: X Min
config_entries.description: The raw value corresponding to the left

config_entries.label: Y Max
config_entries.description: The raw value corresponding to the bottom

config_entries.label: Y Min
config_entries.description: The raw value corresponding to the top

config_entries.label: Display
config_entries.description: The display to use this touchscreen with.

config_entries.label: Touch Timeout
config_entries.description: A timeout for touchscreens that do not report the end of touch. The default varies depending on the touchscreen.

config_entries.label: Transform
config_entries.description: Transform the touchscreen presentation using hardware. All defaults are `false`.

config_entries.label: Mirror X
config_entries.description: If true, mirror the x axis.

config_entries.label: Mirror Y
config_entries.description: If true, mirror the y axis.

config_entries.label: Swap Xy
config_entries.description: If true, exchange the x and y axes.
